title: Scott Palmer
compiled_truth: Scott Palmer is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-10-23 to 2002-05-13), Scott Palmer sent 52 and received 419 emails, totalling 471 interactions. Top correspondents: [Kam Keiser](people/kam-keiser) (32), [M  Love](people/m-love) (22), [D  Winfree](people/d-winfree) (16), [C  Giron](people/c-giron) (14), [Errol Mclaughlin](people/errol-mclaughlin) (12).
